parameters.content:
### When Chat Message Received

Opens a hosted chat session; every user message starts an execution with `chatInput` + `sessionId`.

Next: Keep Valid Requests

### Keep Valid Requests

Drops items that fail the condition; only qualifying items continue (no false branch).

Next: Frame the Assignment

### Frame the Assignment

Shapes the item: writes `assignment`, `deadline`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Coordinator Agent

### Coordinator Agent

The AI brain: reads the input, decides which attached tools to call (and in what order), then composes the answer.

Ports: тСатЖТ Unpack Sections ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЪа failures exit via the error rail

### OpenRouter Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `languageModel`

ЁЯФС OpenRouter API key

### Research Specialist (Sub-workflow)

Specialist sub-workflow exposed as a callable tool тАФ one narrow capability per tool.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `tool`

### Draft Specialist (Sub-workflow)

Specialist sub-workflow exposed as a callable tool тАФ one narrow capability per tool.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `tool`

### Review Specialist (Sub-workflow)

Specialist sub-workflow exposed as a callable tool тАФ one narrow capability per tool.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `tool`

### Enforce Result Schema

Forces the agent's answer into the JSON schema below тАФ downstream nodes rely on this exact shape.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `outputParser`

### Unpack Sections

Explodes the `output.sections` array into one item per element.

Next: Persist Deliverable to Google Sheets

### Persist Deliverable to Google Sheets

googleSheets тАФ `append` operation against the connected account.

Ports: тСатЖТ Fingerprint for Idempotency ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Persist Deliverable to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
### Fingerprint for Idempotency

Custom JavaScript: Build a stable idempotency key per request (djb2 hash, no deps)

Next: Drop Already-Processed Items

### Drop Already-Processed Items

Cross-execution dedupe: remembers keys it has processed before and drops repeats тАФ the idempotency guard.

Next: Stamp Completion Time

### Stamp Completion Time

Stamps `completedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Persist Run Metadata

### Persist Run Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record тАФ searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

googleSheets тАФ `append` operation against the connected account.

Ports: тСатЖТ Send Summary to Slack ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Slack

slack тАФ `action` operation against the connected account.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

slack тАФ `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Park in Dead-Letter Queue

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

# Reply to chat messages at scale for Task Automation (01730)

**Pattern:** Chatbot Responder ┬╖ **Level:** Production ┬╖ **Trigger:** Chat

## What it does
Reply to chat messages at scale for Task Automation (01730). It responds live to chat messages.

## Why it exists
Manual task automation is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
When Chat Message Received тЖТ Keep Valid Requests тЖТ Frame the Assignment тЖТ Coordinator Agent тЖТ Unpack Sections тЖТ Persist Deliverable to Google Sheets тЖТ Fingerprint for Idempotency тЖТ тАж

## Use it for
- Teams that want to chatbot responder without manual effort
- Anyone automating task automation in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2 / service account; OpenRouter API key; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: ЁЯЯж entry ┬╖ ЁЯЯк AI ┬╖ ЁЯЯл actions ┬╖ тмЬ utilities ┬╖ ЁЯЯй outputs ┬╖ ЁЯЯе error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath тАФ read those before editing.

## ЁЯЫЯ Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3├Ч with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail тЖТ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Failures are also parked in a dead-letter queue for replay. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ЁЯдЦ AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens тАФ keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ЁЯз╣ Data quality

Dedupe/diff steps make re-runs safe: the same input twice will not create duplicate records. If you change the key fields, clear n8n's dedupe memory (node тЖТ 'Clear stored keys') before the next run.

## ЁЯЫа Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ЁЯФС lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your task automation process. Every node card explains its role тАФ safe to extend at any marked branch.
